title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Technology Development Board Act, 1995. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st November, 1996,vide notification No. S.O. 602(E), dated 29th August, 1996, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
